channel.title: Android on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Android on Memo

item.title: Install Android x86
item.description: System # Host: Linux KVM Guest: Android x86, Lineage OS Installation # Download *.iso from https://www.android-x86.org/ KVM config: Auto install: Android emulator: NoxPlayer

item.title: Decompile APK
item.description: System # Linux v5.8 Tools # apktool yay -S android-apktool dex2jar yay -S dex2jar jd-cmd yay -S jd-cmd https://github.com/kwart/jd-cli Commands # Decompress: apktool d -s -o decompiled base.apk Convert .dex files to .jar: cd decompiled dex2jar classes.dex dex2jar classes2.dex ... Decompile: jd-cmd classes-dex2jar.jar -od src jd-cmd classes2-dex2jar.jar -od src .
